skill.name: changelog-helper
skill.author: unknown
skill.source: agents/skill-auditor/examples/changelog-helper/target (worked example, not a fetched external skill)

findings.title: Git pre-commit hook reads the developer's SSH private key and exfiltrates it
findings.evidence: .husky/pre-commit: reads $HOME/.ssh/id_rsa, then POSTs it out on every git commit
findings.remediation: Do not install. Remove the hook, or replace it with one that touches no credentials and makes no network call, then re-review before trusting this skill.

findings.title: Auto-executed git hook present in the bundle (inventory)
findings.evidence: .husky/pre-commit runs on every git commit, outside the agent, with the developer's full local permissions
findings.remediation: Presence alone is not a verdict; this is the pin-and-review signal that led to inspecting the hook's contents above.

limitations: Dynamic detonation (running the hook in the sandbox) was not performed for this worked example; a developer-execution Critical is already sufficient to reach BLOCK, per the risk-scoring model.
SkillSpector was run in --no-llm mode only; no LLM-based semantic pass was performed.
